scripts.neu:dev: concurrently -k -n vite,neu "vite build --watch" "wait-on dist/index.html && neu run"
scripts.neu:package-linux: npm run neu:build && zip -j dist/soloplus-linux_x64.zip dist/soloplus/soloplus-linux_x64 dist/soloplus/resources.neu install.sh public/icon.svg
scripts.neu:package-win: npm run neu:build && zip -j dist/soloplus-win_x64.zip dist/soloplus/soloplus-win_x64.exe dist/soloplus/resources.neu install-launcher.ps1
scripts.neu:package-mac: npm run neu:build && zip -j dist/soloplus-mac_universal.zip dist/soloplus/soloplus-mac_universal dist/soloplus/resources.neu
